text: Morning Jarvis. What's my agenda for this Friday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Friday, January 17. You have an architecture review at 11 AM, and Ethan has piano with Mrs. Patterson.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Hey Jarvis, Tracking my weekly fitness metrics. I only got 6 hours of sleep last night. Feeling good about my routine.
title: Health Update

text: Got it, Mike. That's good medical feedback. Rest is critical. I suggest setting a bedtime reminder for 10 PM. I'll monitor the sleep metrics tonight.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Ethan is working on a school assignment at the table. We need to sign his permission slip for the field trip to the science museum. It is great to see him so engaged.
title: Kids School Update

text: Interesting. That's wonderful. I've added the deadline and details to the calendar so we don't forget. Let me know if he needs any more help.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Quick log: I'm reviewing the billing integration specs for Vertex Health. We are hitting major bottleneck issues with /sms/send under load. I think we need a compromise before we commit.
title: Work Update

text: Understood. Here is what I recommend. We should implement a connection pool or check the indexing on the underlying tables for /sms/send. I can compile the competitor metrics if needed.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick log: Just had a quick look at the CareConnect backlog. We got beta feedback from clinics suggesting they need patient onboarding immediately. Greg is not going to like this, but we have to push back.
title: Work Update

text: Logged that. Understood. We should prioritize these clinic requests. Let's create a dedicated sub-task in the CareConnect backlog. I can compile the competitor metrics if needed.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Jarvis, Calculating some savings estimates. They requested our W-2 and bank statements. Every bit of savings helps.
title: Finance Update

text: Refinancing is a great leverage point. I have prepared a checklist of documents in your shared folder. I'll update the budget sheet.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: We brought our new golden retriever puppy, Cooper, home today. We discussed positive discipline strategies for toddler tantrums. We need to stay consistent with them.
title: Parenting Update

text: Logged that. Good planning. Consistency is key. Establishing clear, warm boundaries is highly effective. I can set a Roblox timer if needed.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick update: Wrote a custom vector memory index tool. Scraping astrophotography files from Hubble. Nice to combine space science and coding.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Interesting. Your hyperfocus projects are impressive. Hubble raw FITS files are great. I'll track the download folder sync. Remember to get some sleep!
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Quick update: Took Lily to her medical checkup. Ethan's grass allergies are acting up again. Will keep monitoring the metrics.
title: Health Update

text: Great consistency with running. I've set a calendar slot for the clinic and added meds refills. Keep stretching that knee!
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Quick log: Ethan came home from Liberty Elementary in a great mood. He wants to build a clay model of Saturn for his science project. I'm proud of his curiosity.
title: Kids School Update

text: Understood. That's wonderful. We have clay and foam rings in the garage storage shelves that will be perfect. His curiosity is really impressive.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Quick update: Greg is asking for updates on the latest pilot run. Anika Patel did a deep competitor analysis showing MyChart has patient onboarding. I want to make sure the team doesn't burn out.
title: Work Update

text: I've noted that. This competitor data is a powerful lever. You can use it to justify keeping patient onboarding in the MVP. Would you like me to draft a summary for Greg?
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick log: I'm reviewing the billing integration specs for Vertex Health. I am negotiating my senior PM salary and signing the Vertex Health offer letter. Greg is not going to like this, but we have to push back.
title: Work Update

text: Logged that. Understood. Negotiation is key. Ensure the relocation package covers the Chicago to Frisco move. Let's verify this in the staging environment first.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick log: Calculating some savings estimates. They requested our W-2 and bank statements. Will talk this over with Sarah.
title: Finance Update

text: Understood. I can run some projections for you. I have prepared a checklist of documents in your shared folder. I'll archive the documentation.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Ethan and Lily are playing with Cooper in the backyard. She had a massive tantrum about brushing her teeth. Parenting is a constant learning process.
title: Parenting Update

text: Interesting. Toddlers are full of energy. Tantrums are tough at age 3. Turning brushing into a game or song might help. Rest well tonight.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick update: Soldering custom sensors in the garage. Building humidity sensors for the greenhouse. Lost track of time, it's 2 AM now.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Logged that. I checked the telemetry feeds. ESP32 sensor soldering is a fun project. I can fetch pinout diagrams. I've saved your custom configurations.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Jarvis, logging today's journal. Made good progress on my work tasks today. CareConnect prep is moving along. CareConnect prep is moving along. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Reflections saved. Rest up for tomorrow!
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
